required_complexity_patterns.notes: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click

reference_templates.title: Table layout form
reference_templates.notes: Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Table layout

reference_templates.title: Aria describedby hints
reference_templates.notes: Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Describedby hints

Include country code, e.g. +44 7700 900000

reference_templates.title: List item fields
reference_templates.notes: Each field wrapped in li inside ul list structure
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: List item fields

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Reference DOM (Aria describedby hints): Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label Reference DOM (List item fields): Each field wrapped in li inside ul list structure Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: native-select-not-combobox, pill-yes-no, aria-label-only, label-wraps-deep, details-accordion. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: sidebar + main split apply layout. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Table layout form; Aria describedby hints; List item fields.
